intro: President Trump signed an executive order on AI this week, with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman voicing support and planning meetings with lawmakers in Washington. Microsoft's Project Solara aims to move AI applications beyond personal computers into broader real-world deployment. The UK's competition watchdog ruled that Google must give publishers control over whether their content appears in Google's AI Search features.

whitelist.title: Fortune Tech: Trump AI order, DeepSeek fundraise, Microsoft AI models | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Plus: Anthropic, Bitcoin, Marvell, Nobitex, Palo Alto Networks, Uber, and the newest Fortune 500 list.
other_outlets: Chiang Rai Times (CTN NEWS) - Chiang Rai News

whitelist.title: Google must let publishers opt out of AI Search features, rules UK

whitelist.title: ChatGPT reportedly hit 1 billion monthly active users faster than any other app.
whitelist.desc: According to market intelligence firm Sensor Tower, ChatGPT reached the milestone last month, roughly three years after launching, Reuters reports. It apparently passed 1 billion MAUs faster than the other apps that have hit the benchmark, including Google Maps, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. [Link: ChatGPT app hits 1 billion monthly active users in record time, data shows | https://www.reuters.com/technology/chatgpt-app-hits-1-billion-monthly-active-users-record-time-data-shows-2026-06-02/ | ...

whitelist.title: Google’s new Dreambeans AI app is… different.
